_invariant: sUSD (Synthetix) exposure graph at the 2025-04-18 SIP-420 incentive-failure depeg trough. Token node is the canonical Ethereum-mainnet sUSD (address/decimals/totalSupply read on-chain via Alchemy archive at block 22295741). One depeg-sensitive crypto-collateral edge to a Curve-style market-priced liquidation venue (oracle.oracle_type=MARKET, depeg_sensitive=true, lt~0.80). The depeg price (~$0.66 trough / ~$0.998 recovery) is injected per-case via peg_probes, never stored on the edge. This is a CRYPTO-COLLATERAL incentive-mechanism failure (governance-induced removal of the reflexive peg defense), NOT a fiat-reserve depeg and NOT a flash exploit.

meta.data_source: on-chain Alchemy archive (sUSD 0x57Ab…d5f51 @ block 22295741, ts 2025-04-18T11:59:59Z, totalSupply 32,798,321.96, decimals 18) + SIP-420 mechanism & ~$0.66 trough from Synthetix governance + secondary-market/Curve coverage (Cointelegraph, CoinCentral, The Defiant, Blockworks, ainvest — see EVENT.md)

metadata._note: SNX-backed crypto-collateralized stablecoin. SIP-420 (Apr 2025) cut the staker C-ratio ~750%->200% and socialized staker debt into a shared pool, forgiving ~$60m staker debt over 12 months. This REMOVED each staker's individual incentive to buy discounted sUSD back to repay their own debt — the reflexive peg-defense mechanism — so oversupply was never absorbed and sUSD ground from ~$1.00 to a ~$0.66-0.68 low around 2025-04-18 over multiple weeks. NOT a backing failure (SNX collateral intact) and NOT a flash exploit: a governance-induced incentive failure. Ethereum-mainnet token shown; the bulk of sUSD float/Curve liquidity is on Optimism, but the depeg is a property of the asset across venues.

sUSD comprised >75% of the major Curve sUSD pools at the trough — the pool was heavily imbalanced toward sUSD as holders exited into the other legs. Modeled as the deep market-priced venue whose oracle reads the real sUSD/USD secondary price, the same price a collateral liquidation engine would use.

meta.data_source: Market-priced, depeg-sensitive crypto-collateral venue for sUSD (Curve-style mono-pool / isolated lending). lt=0.80 is the representative liquidation line; at the ~$0.66 trough the asset price sits far BELOW lt, so a market oracle puts any looped/leveraged sUSD-collateral position past liquidation.
